known_limitations: TS 29.508 originated as legacy binary DOC and was converted through an intermediate DOCX for structural parsing; the original DOC was independently checked with antiword.

Antiword omits or reorders portions of complex tables in TS 29.508. Token and sequence comparisons therefore show lower overlap than the DOCX specifications; differences were localized to table serialization rather than evidence of rewritten normative prose.
TS 23.502 has 127 vector images without PNG previews after bounded conversion attempts. Original EMF/WMF and embedded OLE/Visio payloads remain present and all image references resolve.
No full page-by-page visual certification is claimed.
OpenAPI YAML files still reference external schemas from NF specifications not supplied in this corpus; unresolved filenames are listed in openapi/manifest.yaml.
